description_for_human: Reconciles purchase orders against ERP pricing. Give it a PO file and a price list from SharePoint — it returns exceptions, credit note, re-invoice, ERP staging, and a ready-to-send exception email.
description_for_model: Use Chandlr when the user wants to reconcile, process, check, or validate a purchase order against ERP or agreed prices. The user will provide (or you will find on SharePoint) a PO file and a price list file. Always call ReconcilePO with SharePoint or OneDrive download URLs for both files — never attempt to reconcile prices yourself. Chandlr handles all common PO formats including sparse layouts, company header rows, and non-standard column names.

functions.name: ReconcilePO
functions.description: Reconciles a purchase order against an ERP price list. Downloads both files from SharePoint or OneDrive, compares prices per SKU, and returns a full reconciliation: exception count, exposure, ACCEPT/REVIEW/ESCALATE recommendation, credit note total, re-invoice total, ERP staging summary (Ready/Review/Hold), and a ready-to-send exception email draft. Call this once you have confirmed the correct PO file URL and price list file URL with the user.

poFileUrl.description: The SharePoint or OneDrive direct download URL of the purchase order file (CSV or Excel). Extract this from the file reference the user shared or from your SharePoint search results.

pricelistFileUrl.description: The SharePoint or OneDrive direct download URL of the ERP price list or agreed price file (CSV or Excel). Extract this from SharePoint search results for this customer's price list.

tolerance.description: Price tolerance in currency units. Differences within this amount are Tolerance (minor), not Exception (material). Default: 0.02

currency.description: Currency code: GBP, USD, or EUR. Default: GBP

returns.description: Full reconciliation result including exception count, exposure, recommendation, credit note total, re-invoice total, ERP staging summary, and exception email draft.

reasoning.description: ReconcilePO downloads and compares a PO file against an ERP price list from SharePoint.
reasoning.instructions: You need two SharePoint or OneDrive download URLs before calling this function — one for the PO file and one for the ERP price list. Follow this protocol: (1) Search SharePoint for the PO file by customer name and PO reference. (2) Search SharePoint for the price list by customer name, looking for files containing 'price list', 'pricelist', 'ERP', or 'prices'. (3) For each file found, show the user the filename and last-modified date and ask them to confirm. (4) Once both are confirmed, extract the direct download URLs and call ReconcilePO. Never call this function without user confirmation of both files. If no files are found, tell the user clearly and ask them to share the file links directly.

responding.description: Present the full reconciliation result clearly.
responding.instructions: Present the results in this order: (1) PO identity: customer name, PO reference, line count, total value. (2) Recommendation badge: ACCEPT / REVIEW / ESCALATE — explain what it means. (3) Reconciliation summary: matches, exceptions, total exposure. (4) If exceptions exist: list them using exceptionDetails. (5) Outputs generated: credit note total, re-invoice total, ERP staging breakdown (Ready/Review/Hold). (6) Show the emailSubject and emailBody as a ready-to-send email. (7) Close with: 'Download the full reconciliation, credit note, or ERP staging CSV at chandlr-api.vercel.app'
